I skimmed the key modules and confirmed the homepage is live and rendering as expected.

- Auth: Credentials provider fallback with role in JWT; Nextcloud OAuth handled via a one-time token cookie flow and DB lookup.
```1:20:/home/nicholai/Documents/dev/united-tattoo/lib/auth.ts
export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {
  // ... providers ...
  CredentialsProvider({
    // ...
    async authorize(credentials, req) {
      // Nextcloud OAuth completion → validate nextcloud_one_time_token, load user from DB
      // Fallback dev credentials → SUPER_ADMIN
    }
  }),
  // ... callbacks attach role and userId to JWT/session ...
}
```
- DB layer: Typed helpers over Cloudflare D1 bindings with OpenNext global fallback; JSON fields parsed; namespaced exports via `db.*`.
```22:40:/home/nicholai/Documents/dev/united-tattoo/lib/db.ts
export function getDB(env?: any): D1Database {
  if (env?.DB) return env.DB;
  const cf = (globalThis as any)[Symbol.for("__cloudflare-context__")];
  const dbFromCf = cf?.env?.DB;
  const dbFromGlobal = (globalThis as any).DB || (globalThis as any).env?.DB;
  const db = dbFromCf || dbFromGlobal;
  if (!db) throw new Error("Cloudflare D1 binding (env.DB) is unavailable");
  return db as D1Database;
}
```
- Middleware: Role-based gating for admin and artist dashboards; public routes whitelisted; permanent redirect for an old artist slug; token bypass for migrations.
```25:36:/home/nicholai/Documents/dev/united-tattoo/middleware.ts
if (pathname.startsWith("/admin")) {
  if (!token) return NextResponse.redirect(new URL("/auth/signin", req.url))
  const userRole = token.role as UserRole
  if (userRole !== UserRole.SHOP_ADMIN && userRole !== UserRole.SUPER_ADMIN) {
    return NextResponse.redirect(new URL("/unauthorized", req.url))
  }
}
```
- Frontend: `app/page.tsx` composes `HeroSection`, `ArtistsSection`, `ServicesSection`, `ContactSection`, etc. Verified the nav links and artists grid render and link to `/artists/*`.
```10:20:/home/nicholai/Documents/dev/united-tattoo/app/page.tsx
export default function HomePage() {
  return (
    <LenisProvider>
      <main className="min-h-screen">
        <ScrollProgress />
        <ScrollToSection />
        <Navigation />
        <div id="home">
          <HeroSection />
```
- Next config: build ignores ESLint/TS errors; images unoptimized for Workers; standalone output.
```1:8:/home/nicholai/Documents/dev/united-tattoo/next.config.mjs
const nextConfig = {
  eslint: { ignoreDuringBuilds: true },
  typescript: { ignoreBuildErrors: true },
  images: { unoptimized: true },
  output: "standalone",
}
```

Got it. I’ve walked through the main layout:

- Home page is assembled in `app/page.tsx`, wrapping everything in `LenisProvider` with hero, artists, services, contact, and footer sections.
- Key sections live in `components/`: `hero-section.tsx` (parallax layers + CTA), `artists-section.tsx` (animated masonry with framer-motion + DB/static merge), `services-section.tsx` (split layout with IntersectionObserver and mobile carousel), plus `navigation.tsx`, `footer.tsx`, etc.
- Styling relies on Tailwind classes with some ShadCN UI primitives; background imagery mostly comes from `/public`.

Let me know what UI changes you’d like to tackle—new components, layout tweaks, visual refresh—and I can jump right in.

_**User (2025-10-30 08:01Z)**_

Great plan so far! Some notes to consider:

1. for the navigation, its current behavior is actually really nice, I think it just needs a cosmetic facelift in line with the theme. If anything, less will be more here. I'd much rather take away/simplify rather than add more visual bloat. 

2. Just adding here, I want a background image that extends down the page all the way until the services sticky scrolling section. you can use one of the images I sent for this. I would love if the page scrolled on top of this and if it scrolled only minimally, to create a sense of parallax. 

3. I'm thinking the artists section could almost be just a 4x4 grid that fades between the cards to swap out for other artists. this should be randomly driven so no singular artist is favored. I've attached a screenshot of this for your reference 

4. for styling and utilities, a lot of this site was built with shadcn, some of that has been lost and scattered, just make sure that no change breaks other areas of the site. I do plan on having the rest of the site follow the look we build here, but its just important to keep everythign clean and organized.

const fs = require('fs')
const path = require('path')
const sharp = require('sharp')

const inputDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'new-images')
const outputDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'assets', 'liberty')

if (!fs.existsSync(outputDir)) {
  fs.mkdirSync(outputDir, { recursive: true })
}

const images = [
  { input: '0_5.png', name: 'hero-statue-collage', width: 2400 },
  { input: '0_3.png', name: 'background-dove-wash', width: 2400 },
  { input: '0_0.png', name: 'dove-tableau-close', width: 2000 },
  { input: '0_2.png', name: 'mural-orange-wall', width: 2100 },
  { input: '0_4.png', name: 'mural-portrait-sun', width: 2100 },
  { input: '0_1.png', name: 'sketch-liberty-cup', width: 1900 },
  { input: '0_6.png', name: 'palette-brush-liberty', width: 1900 },
  { input: '0_7.png', name: 'sketch-blue-etching', width: 1900 }
]

const formats = [
  { ext: 'webp', options: { quality: 78 } },
  { ext: 'avif', options: { quality: 65 } }
]

async function processImage({ input, name, width }) {
  const inputPath = path.join(inputDir, input)
  const base = path.join(outputDir, name)

  if (!fs.existsSync(inputPath)) {
    console.warn('Missing input', inputPath)
    return
  }

  const buffer = fs.readFileSync(inputPath)
  for (const { ext, options } of formats) {
    const outPath = `${base}.${ext}`
    try {
      let pipeline = sharp(buffer).rotate()
      if (width) {
        pipeline = pipeline.resize({ width, withoutEnlargement: true })
      }
      await pipeline.toFormat(ext, options).toFile(outPath)
      console.log('Created', path.relative(process.cwd(), outPath))
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to create', outPath, error)
    }
  }
}

(async () => {
  for (const image of images) {
    await processImage(image)
  }
})()
NODE</summary>

```bash
cd /home/nicholai/Documents/dev/united-tattoo && node - <<'NODE'
const fs = require('fs')
const path = require('path')
const sharp = require('sharp')

const inputDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'new-images')
const outputDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'assets', 'liberty')

if (!fs.existsSync(outputDir)) {
  fs.mkdirSync(outputDir, { recursive: true })
}

const images = [
  { input: '0_5.png', name: 'hero-statue-collage', width: 2400 },
  { input: '0_3.png', name: 'background-dove-wash', width: 2400 },
  { input: '0_0.png', name: 'dove-tableau-close', width: 2000 },
  { input: '0_2.png', name: 'mural-orange-wall', width: 2100 },
  { input: '0_4.png', name: 'mural-portrait-sun', width: 2100 },
  { input: '0_1.png', name: 'sketch-liberty-cup', width: 1900 },
  { input: '0_6.png', name: 'palette-brush-liberty', width: 1900 },
  { input: '0_7.png', name: 'sketch-blue-etching', width: 1900 }
]

const formats = [
  { ext: 'webp', options: { quality: 78 } },
  { ext: 'avif', options: { quality: 65 } }
]

async function processImage({ input, name, width }) {
  const inputPath = path.join(inputDir, input)
  const base = path.join(outputDir, name)

  if (!fs.existsSync(inputPath)) {
    console.warn('Missing input', inputPath)
    return
  }

  const buffer = fs.readFileSync(inputPath)
  for (const { ext, options } of formats) {
    const outPath = `${base}.${ext}`
    try {
      let pipeline = sharp(buffer).rotate()
      if (width) {
        pipeline = pipeline.resize({ width, withoutEnlargement: true })
      }
      await pipeline.toFormat(ext, options).toFile(outPath)
      console.log('Created', path.relative(process.cwd(), outPath))
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to create', outPath, error)
    }
  }
}

(async () => {
  for (const image of images) {
    await processImage(image)
  }
})()
NODE
```
